title: Personal Portfolio
summary: The website you're looking at right now.
description: Personal career hub built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS, deployed via Cloudflare Pages. Designed to eventually auto-generate a CV/resume from a single structured data source.
highlights: Deployed via Cloudflare Pages with custom domain on aarnavdahal.com.np
Static export pipeline from GitHub to Cloudflare Pages

title: Plato
summary: AI-powered student dining and meal-booking platform.
description: Group capstone project (CMP4285 Innovation Project) connecting students with dining hosts. Built two AI-driven features: a weighted meal recommendation engine and an image-based food filter using a Vision Transformer model.
highlights: Built /api/ai/recommended/ meal recommendation endpoint using a weighted scoring formula (booking velocity, rating, availability, recency)
Built /api/ai/filter-image/ using HuggingFace's google/vit-base-patch16-224 with a three-zone confidence threshold
Implemented a QA review endpoint for moderating AI-flagged content

title: K-D Tree Based Nearest Star and Constellation Search
summary: Spatial-indexing benchmark project using the HYG Star Database.
description: DSA technical report and implementation comparing brute-force vs. K-D tree nearest-neighbor search across roughly 120,000 stars, with a constellation search demo built on top.
highlights: Achieved a 1776x speedup over brute force search (0.13ms vs 231.46ms average query time)
10.04MB peak memory usage with a 1.978s tree build time
Used the HYG Star Database (~120,000 stars)
